title: HeroesOfMultiverse
description: Became whatever you want, a hero, a villain or a simple citizen !
body:
# Always want to be a superhero ?

Embark on an extraordinary Minecraft adventure with the "Heroes of Multiverse" modpack! This carefully crafted modpack blends technology, combat, and heroics to deliver an unmatched gaming experience.

## Want to create cities, factory and become kind of billionaire superhero ?

Use Create to unleash your inner engineer, Palladium with Fsang18's Heropack grant you many powers to became a hero or a villain, become Iron-Man, Batman, Superman, WonderWoman and many more !

## Make your own adventure

Why stay in overworld when you could have your own dimension ? Move out and create your own history, travel throug dimensions with Tempad, explore the Nether and the End with many changes ! 

You can also simply stay a human and create your own shop with create, some addons simply add more gameplay.

## Create your own village

With minecolony, create your own colony and make it bigger, protect your citizen from invaders and help them

### Optimizations

Some mods offer optimizations and add change in visual renderer such as Distant Horizon, Oculus and Embeddium.
